use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for account creation and registration forms
Destructive action buttons for account deletion or warning confirmations
Secondary action buttons for cancel or skip options in multi-step forms
Navigation buttons linking to terms, privacy policies, or external resources
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbar actions within form interfaces
ai_summary: A versatile atomic button component from Ruixen.Ui with six visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and four size options. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for variant management, and Tailwind CSS for styling. Includes standard accessibility features like focus-visible rings, disabled states, and keyboard navigation support. Designed for mixed platform deployment across desktop and mobile interfaces.
